extraction.one_line_summary: DENNIS Rohan won the Stage 16 ITT by 1:14 over MARTIN Tony, while DUMOULIN Tom limited losses to YATES Simon to retain GC contention at 2:11.
tactical_patterns: DUMOULIN Tom finished 22 seconds behind DENNIS Rohan despite time trial specialty, suggesting accumulated fatigue from previous mountain stages.
YATES Simon's 2:11 gap post-ITT prompted tactical shift to defensive riding, revealing team confidence threshold for summit finish protection.
ARU Fabio posted surprisingly slow time relative to MARTIN Tony baseline, signaling deeper GC collapse than mountain stage losses alone suggested.

rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: positive: dominant ITT victory by 1:14 margin confirms peak time trial form
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: limited GC damage to 2:11 while finishing third in ITT maintains realistic podium threat
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: survived ITT test but explicit defensive shift indicates team fears time gaps insufficient for remaining mountain stages
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: strong ITT performance closing gap on DUMOULIN Tom suggests building form after earlier weakness
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: negative: unexpectedly slow ITT relative to capabilities confirms comprehensive collapse from GC contention
rider_signals.MARTIN Tony: positive: second place by 1:14 demonstrates sustained time trial class despite race fatigue
